title: Paradise Island
short: White sand, turquoise water, coral reefs and protected mangroves at Cayo Arena.
tagline: Discover a tropical paradise in the heart of the Caribbean.
overview: Escape to one of the Dominican Republic's most breathtaking natural treasures. Journey to Punta Rucia before boarding a boat to Paradise Island, a tiny coral island surrounded by crystal-clear turquoise waters. Snorkel among tropical fish, explore protected mangrove forests and enjoy the untouched beauty of the Caribbean Sea.
highlights: Scenic drive along the North Coast
info: Excursion days: Monday, Wednesday and Friday
Accessibility: Suitable for most guests; moderate physical activity required.

activities.title: Scenic Drive to Punta Rucia
activities.text: Travel along the beautiful northern coastline and arrive at Punta Rucia, a charming fishing village known for peaceful atmosphere and breathtaking ocean views.

activities.title: Paradise Island & Snorkeling
activities.text: Discover Cayo Arena and snorkel among colorful tropical fish, coral formations and diverse marine life in one of the Caribbean's most beautiful natural environments.

activities.title: Mangrove Eco Tour
activities.text: Explore protected mangrove forests, birds, fish, crabs and native wildlife while enjoying a relaxing boat ride through nature.

title: Puerto Plata City Tour
short: History, culture, colorful streets, panoramic viewpoints and authentic local charm.
tagline: Discover the history, culture and charm of the Dominican Republic's North Coast.
overview: Explore the highlights of Puerto Plata, one of the Dominican Republic's most historic and colorful cities. Visit iconic landmarks, stroll through charming colonial streets, admire panoramic views and discover local traditions, shopping and scenery.
info: Accessibility: Suitable for guests of all ages and most fitness levels.

activities.title: Isabel de Torres Mountain
activities.text: Travel to Puerto Plata's famous landmark for panoramic views of the city, coastline and mountains, plus botanical gardens and the Christ the Redeemer statue.

activities.title: Historic Downtown & Cultural Landmarks
activities.text: Explore the historic center, Victorian architecture, lively atmosphere, Umbrella Street and Pink Street.

activities.title: San Felipe Fortress & Local Shopping
activities.text: Visit the colonial fortress and browse Dominican amber, larimar jewelry, coffee, rum, cigars and handcrafted souvenirs.

title: Jeep Safari + Damajagua Falls
short: Open-air safari, rural villages, tropical forest and the famous Damajagua waterfalls.
tagline: The ultimate off-road and waterfall adventure in Puerto Plata.
overview: Experience the perfect combination of adventure, nature and Dominican culture. Travel by open-air safari jeep through the lush countryside, visit authentic rural communities and discover the world-famous Damajagua Waterfalls. Climb, jump, slide and swim through natural waterfalls before a traditional Dominican lunch.
highlights: Natural water slides and cliff jumps
info: Lunch: Chicken, rice, eggplant and salads
Transportation: Air-conditioned bus or jeep safari
Optional additions: Monkey or Zip Line tours, additional payment
Accessibility: Not recommended for wheelchair users due to multiple stairs.

activities.title: Damajagua Waterfalls Adventure
activities.text: Hike through tropical forest before sliding, jumping and swimming through crystal-clear waterfalls and natural pools under certified guide supervision.

activities.title: Jungle Jeep Safari
activities.text: Ride through countryside, villages, plantations, rivers and mountain landscapes while learning about local culture and traditions.

activities.title: Dominican Lunch & Scenic Views
activities.text: Relax after your adventure with a traditional Dominican lunch and unforgettable memories of Puerto Plata's natural beauty.

title: Catamaran
short: Sail, swim, snorkel, dance and celebrate along Puerto Plata's turquoise coastline.
tagline: Sail, swim and celebrate in the turquoise waters of Puerto Plata.
overview: Step aboard a spacious catamaran and enjoy a Caribbean adventure along Puerto Plata's coastline. Relax under the sun, snorkel in crystal-clear waters, dance to tropical music and enjoy refreshing drinks while taking in breathtaking ocean views.
info: Accessibility: Suitable for most guests and families; requires boarding a catamaran and walking on moving surfaces.

activities.title: Coastal Sailing Experience
activities.text: Set sail along Puerto Plata's coastline and admire mountain, beach and Caribbean Sea views while enjoying fresh ocean breezes.

activities.title: Snorkeling Adventure
activities.text: Dive into crystal-clear waters and discover tropical fish, coral formations and vibrant marine life with provided snorkeling equipment.

activities.title: Caribbean Party Onboard
activities.text: Enjoy music, dancing, drinks and a lively atmosphere while cruising across turquoise waters.

title: Dune Buggy Tour
short: Drive your own buggy through off-road trails, villages, beaches and Dominican countryside.
tagline: Experience the Dominican countryside like never before.
overview: Get ready for an exciting off-road adventure through Puerto Plata's countryside. Drive your own dune buggy along scenic trails, discover communities, visit hidden beaches and experience authentic Dominican lifestyle. Expect mud, adventure, landscapes and unforgettable memories.
info: Excursion day: Every day, mornings or afternoons
Equipment: Helmet and safety instructions included
Driver requirement: A valid driver's license is not required; you only need to be 17 years or older to drive.
Accessibility: Moderate mobility required; uneven terrain.

activities.title: Off-Road Dune Buggy Adventure
activities.text: Take the wheel through rugged trails, dirt roads and tropical landscapes. Get ready to get a little muddy.

activities.title: Dominican Countryside Experience
activities.text: Travel through villages and discover rural Dominican life, culture and spectacular views along the way.

activities.title: Beach Stop & Relaxation
activities.text: Pause at a beautiful beach for photos, ocean breeze and a refreshing break before heading back.

title: ATV Adventure
short: Ride through dirt roads, tropical trails, local villages and beautiful beach stops.
tagline: Ride through Puerto Plata's most spectacular landscapes.
overview: Experience the thrill of riding an all-terrain vehicle through Dominican countryside. Travel along dirt roads, tropical trails and scenic paths while discovering local villages, natural scenery and hidden coastal treasures. This adventure combines adrenaline, culture and breathtaking views.
info: Excursion day: Every day, mornings or afternoons
Equipment: Helmet and safety instructions included
Driver requirement: A valid driver's license is not required; you only need to be 17 years or older to drive.
Accessibility: Participants must be able to operate or ride on an ATV and navigate uneven terrain.

activities.title: ATV Off-Road Adventure
activities.text: Take control of your ATV and ride through dirt roads, tropical trails and rugged terrain from a completely different perspective.

activities.title: Discover Dominican Culture
activities.text: Pass through local communities and rural landscapes while learning about traditions and daily life.

activities.title: Beach Escape
activities.text: Relax at a beautiful beach stop, enjoy the breeze and capture photos of the North Coast.

title: Deep-Sea Fishing
short: Private charter fishing in the Atlantic with professional crew, equipment and ocean views.
tagline: An unforgettable offshore fishing adventure in the Atlantic Ocean.
overview: Experience deep-sea fishing off Puerto Plata's coast. Whether experienced or trying it for the first time, the professional crew guides you to top fishing grounds. Enjoy time on the open ocean while targeting game fish and taking in Caribbean views.
highlights: Ideal for beginners and experienced anglers
info: Accessibility: Participants should be comfortable boarding a boat and spending several hours at sea.

activities.title: Offshore Fishing Adventure
activities.text: Head into deep Atlantic waters aboard a fully equipped fishing boat with an experienced local captain and crew.

activities.title: Catch Trophy Fish
activities.text: Depending on season, target species such as Mahi-Mahi, Wahoo, Tuna, Barracuda, Blue Marlin and White Marlin.

activities.title: Relax & Enjoy the Caribbean
activities.text: Even non-anglers love the coastal views, fresh sea breeze and peaceful open-ocean atmosphere.

title: Horseback Riding
short: Ride through jungle, villages, rivers, beaches and a natural lagoon with friendly guides.
tagline: Ride through the Dominican countryside, jungle, rivers and pristine beaches.
overview: Experience the Dominican Republic from a unique perspective as you ride through tropical forests, peaceful villages, scenic rivers and untouched beaches. Friendly guides and well-trained horses make it suitable for first-time riders and experienced guests.
highlights: Suitable for beginners and experienced riders
info: Accessibility: Suitable for most guests with basic mobility; no previous riding experience required.
Not recommended for wheelchair users, pregnant women, serious back/neck/joint conditions or severe mobility limitations.

activities.title: Beach & Lagoon Experience
activities.text: Ride across sugarcane fields to the beach, take photos and cool off with a refreshing swim in a natural lagoon.

activities.title: Horses for Every Rider
activities.text: Gentle, healthy horses and bilingual guides help beginners and experienced riders feel comfortable and confident.

activities.title: Ride Through the Countryside
activities.text: Begin at a private ranch before riding through tropical vegetation, rivers and Dominican villages.

title: Laguna Dudu + Laguna Gri Gri + Playa Caleton
short: A full day of blue lagoons, mangroves, fruit plantation and beaches on the North Coast.
tagline: Explore the hidden treasures of the Dominican Republic's North Coast.
overview: Spend a full day discovering some of the most spectacular natural attractions along the northern coastline. Visit a tropical fruit plantation, swim in blue lagoons, admire breathtaking beaches and explore Gri Gri Lagoon surrounded by mangroves and wildlife.
highlights: Boat ride at Gri Gri Lagoon
info: Lunch: Fish, chicken, rice, eggplant and salads
Accessibility: Not recommended for wheelchair users due to multiple stairs at the lagoon.

activities.title: Playa Caleton & Gri-Gri Lagoon
activities.text: Admire Playa Caleton before exploring Gri Gri Lagoon, a natural paradise filled with mangroves, birds and aquatic wildlife.

activities.title: Dudu Blue Lagoon
activities.text: Swim in crystal-clear turquoise freshwater surrounded by lush tropical vegetation and incredible blue color.

activities.title: Tropical Fruit Plantation and More
activities.text: Visit a local fruit plantation, enjoy seasonal tropical fruits and learn about Dominican agriculture.

title: Ocean World Adventure Park
short: Marine animal shows, aquariums, tropical gardens, optional animal encounters and family fun.
tagline: A day of marine encounters, exciting shows and unforgettable family fun.
overview: Spend an incredible day at Ocean World Adventure Park, Puerto Plata's premier marine attraction. Discover marine life, enjoy animal shows, relax in tropical surroundings and create family memories with dolphins, sea lions, tropical birds and sharks.
highlights: Dolphin, sea lion and tropical bird shows
info: Accessibility: Suitable for all ages and most mobility levels; most areas are paved.
Wheelchair accessible: Most facilities are wheelchair friendly.
Special assistance: Please inform in advance if required.
Includes: Food is included with all activities (drinks are not included).
bring: Extra cash for optional activities and souvenirs

activities.title: Marine Animal Shows
activities.text: Enjoy educational presentations featuring dolphins, sea lions, tropical birds and fascinating marine animals.

activities.title: Explore the Marine Park
activities.text: Walk through tropical gardens, aquariums, bird habitats, shark exhibits and interactive marine displays.

activities.title: Optional Animal Encounters
activities.text: Upgrade with experiences such as swimming with dolphins, interacting with sea lions or snorkeling in the reef aquarium.
